name: LSM 980 Airyscan Confocal
description: Zeiss LSM 980 with Airyscan 2 multiplex detector enabling super-resolution confocal imaging at 1.7x improved lateral resolution over standard confocal. Equipped with 405, 445, 488, 514, 561, and 633 nm laser lines. Suitable for live-cell time-lapse, fixed multi-channel fluorescence, and co-localisation studies. Environmental chamber available for temperature and CO2 control.
